title: Senior Software Engineer - Texas Instruments India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Texas Instruments India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Texas Instruments India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Texas Instruments India:
Texas Instruments India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India!
